text: Standing here, I sense the merging of intellect and creativity—the first scene is full of anticipation, the promise of dialogue and collaboration behind those glass walls. The second scene is a vibrant celebration of ideas—innovation as both an abstract force and a concrete manifestation on the walls, in the words and displays. I feel both the formality of structured inquiry and the freedom of imaginative exploration, as if philosophy and science are shaking hands in a colorful, dynamic space. I am quietly inspired, alert to meaning in the arrangement of space and symbols.
